summary: Solid implementation with good testing and workflow design. Best practices followed (set -euo pipefail, pinned actions, meaningful error handling). Key issue: significant duplication in dimension loops (generate-matrix.sh lines 73–92: language and feature-flags loops are identical patterns, should be a function) and fixture verification steps in workflow (Fixture 1 and 2 blocks nearly identical). Duplication adds ~30% bloat and makes changes risky. jq complexity is a maintenance concern; no input type validation for arrays/objects.
